data.Modification: Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Bruker Daltonics SERVA-ICPL(TM) quantification chemistry, light form

project.title: Monoclonal antibody LC-MS/MS -  Precision de novo peptide sequencing using mirror proteases of Ac-LysargiNase and trypsin for large-scale proteomics
project.projectDescription: Precision de novo peptide sequencing using mirror proteases of Ac-LysargiNase and trypsin for large-scale proteomics
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Using trypsin and Ac-LysargiNase to split monoclonal antibody
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Database search engine: pFind Precursor/Fragment ion tolerance: 20 ppm De novo sequencing: pNovoM, pNovo+ and PEAKS Precursor/Fragment ion tolerance: 20 ppm

submitters.title: Mr
